MWCapture SDK  3.3.1.1556

MWCapture SDK Documentation

Version 3 of the Magewell Software Development Kit ("SDKv3") is the latest release of the software development kit supporting Magewell's Pro Capture, Eco Capture, USB Capture Gen 2 and USB Capture Plus families. The SDK is designed to be easy to use and provides many reference examples to help you get up to speed and allow you to quickly port and optimize your applications and algorithms. For example, SDKv3 provides sample LowLatency code for users who want to know more about minimizing latency.

Focusing on programmer productivity, the SDK's software development libraries and examples include tools for application improvement and performance optimization. The development library provides APIs developed by Magewell that enable you to incorporate functionality specific to our capture devices - such as audio and video capture, obtaining input signal information, setting the input source and more - into your software. You can use these applications directly or use the included examples to build your own Visual C#, Java, Visual C++, and Visual Basic applications.

Note:

  1. SDKv3 does not support Gen 1 (Hybrid card or USB) products. Only the previous SDKv2 supports these older products. References to "all devices" below do not include the Gen 1 devices; users of these products should use SDKv2.
  2. The software development library contains only C++ header files (*.h) and dynamic-link libraries (*.lib, *.dll), while examples are provided in four programming languages for SDKv3.
    • MWCapture SDKv3 Software Development Library provides a set of APIs to develop features for your capture card.
    • MWCapture SDKv3 Examples provides sample code in multiple languages, such as C++, C Sharp, Visual Basic, and Java.
    • MWCapture SDKv3 Release Notes records notable changes for the released version of the SDK.
